5.0.short_description: Exports walls. If no range is specified, then all walls in the model are exported. At the moment, it is only possible to export walls to geometry sets.

keywords.name: wall.export.geometry
keywords.description: Set the geometry set base name to <a class="reference internal" href="

keywords.name: wall.export.geometry.split
keywords.description: If specified, the split keyword results in each wall being exported into a dedicated geometry set

examples.command: domain extent - 10 10 wall generate sphere position 0.0 0.0 5.0 radius 2.5 wall generate cone base - 2.5 0.0 - 5.0 axis 1 1 1 height 2.0 radius 0.1 2.5 ... cap true true resolution 0.5 onewall wall generate disk radius 5.0 dip 45.0 ddir 90.0 wall export geometry geometry export walls . stl format stl

domain extent - 10 10 wall generate sphere position 0.0 0.0 5.0 radius 2.5 wall generate cone base - 2.5 0.0 - 5.0 axis 1 1 1 height 2.0 radius 0.1 2.5 ... cap true true resolution 0.5 onewall wall generate disk radius 5.0 dip 45.0 ddir 90.0 wall export geometry split geometry set walls_wall1 geometry export wall1 . stl format stl
